reviews.comment:
Fin de semana largo, un solo muchacho despachando combustible, por solo dos bocas de expendio. NO aceptaron pagar con la app, por lo cual se perdieron beneficios... y ni hablar de la demora final resultante... 1:30 hs más al viaje... de haber conocido las opciones disponibles unos km más adelante, NO PARABA AHI.

(Translated by Google)
Long weekend, just one guy pumping fuel, at only two pumps. They didn't accept payments with the app, so I missed out on the benefits... and don't even get me started on the resulting delay... an extra 1.5 hours to the trip... if I had known about the options available a few kilometers further on, I WOULDN'T HAVE STOPPED THERE.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7326459960207089806/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXbmF5TWtnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Esta en una ubicación fácil de acceder desde la autopista, baños limpios.
Lindo lugar con mesas y bancos y abundante sombra detrás de las instalaciónes...

(Translated by Google)
It's in an easily accessible location from the highway, and the restrooms are clean. It's a nice spot with tables and benches and plenty of shade behind the building.
